title: Transept AI — Translation Software with Memory
excerpt: AI translation that remembers your decisions — every terminology and tone choice carries across documents, languages, and your team. Glossaries, styleguides, and review built in.
content_html:
— From literary fiction to localization at scale —

Where every decision becomes memory

Transept AI is the AI-powered translation workspace that remembers your decisions — every terminology and tone choice carries across documents, languages, and your team, with glossaries, styleguides, and review built in.

Chill, love

No project

M

Memory

Import

Try:

Search

Scope

AI context

Manage TM settings

Showing matches for the selected block

71%

A key turned in the lock and the door swung open.

У замку повернувся ключ, і двері розчахнулися.

Chill, love — chapter 2you · last week

This doc55%

The knock came just before midnight.

Стукіт пролунав перед самою північчю.

Chill, loveyou · today

Auto-saved · just nowSearching everywhere you’ve translated

Interactive demo — click anything

Featured on

Who it's for✦

Three audiences, one workflow

  • I.

    For translators

    Batch translation, QA built in, and a styleguide per client — so a 50-page job reads like one translator wrote it.

    Translate faster, deliver better →

  • II.

    For content creators

    Define your tone once. Batch your backlog. Ship in any language before the publishing window closes.

    Publish in your voice →

  • III.

    For localization teams

    Shared glossaries, shared styleguides, comment threads on every block — twelve languages from one source of truth.

    Scale your team workflow →

The product✦

What it actually does, in six steps

  • I.

    Bring in any document, get a translation

    DOCX, PDF, MD, TXT — or paste raw text. Side-by-side editor, your language pair on the way in. Translation is the starting point, not the destination.

  • II.

    A glossary that travels with you

    Build once, toggle on per project. Terminology stays consistent — page 1 to page 500, language 1 to language 12.

  • III.

    A memory that remembers your decisions

    Every translation you approve is remembered — the wording, and the reasoning behind it: the alternatives you rejected, the comments that explained the call. Transept hands that back to the model on the next run, across your documents and across your team. We call it decision-context memory — not a lookup you copy from, but memory that carries your judgment, not just your words.

  • IV.

    Steer any sentence with a direction

    Sentence-level control. Add a custom direction ("more formal," "keep the metaphor") and your glossary and styleguide feed in automatically — so the rewrite obeys your terminology and stays in your tone. The rest of the page stays put.

  • V.

    Literess reads, remembers, and acts

    A literary editor at your side — she remembers your projects and preferences between documents, reads the translation, and flags where the tone has flattened or the meaning has drifted. And she acts: run a workflow, draft a document, move a job across your board — on your say-so. Not a chatbot bolted on; an editor who does the work.

  • VI.

    Review and ship

    A clean reading view for the final pass. Comments on any block; reply and resolve in place. Send a link to a reviewer or client — no DOCX-by-email.

Pricing✦

Simple pricing

Pay for words you actually translate — self-serve, no sales call to start. Top up when you need more; extra words don’t expire.

Standard mode spends 1 word per source word. Pro mode uses a deeper model — 3 words per source word. Manual edits, exports, comments, and review activity are free — words are only spent when a block is translated by AI.

Free

Always free

€0/ month

1,500 words / month

For your first projects

Unlimited users

~5 pagesper month

Standard mode, 1 word per source word.

  • Standard quality — fast, accurate, faithful
  • Translation memory — a database of past translations, reused for consistency
  • Workflows — chain translate, proofread, and checks into one run
  • Glossary, styleguide, QA, import / export — all included
  • Notion, Drive, TMX / XLIFF — import, export, bring your own memory
  • 50+ languages — from Spanish to Tagalog, shelf to shelf
  • 10 lifetime messages with Literess — your agentic AI literary editor, who remembers your projects and preferences
  • No credit card required

Begin without paying →

Most chosen

Starter

€29/ month

100,000 words / month

For regular client work

and Starter adds

  • Pro mode — deeper model for nuance, 3 words per source word
  • Batch translation across whole projects
  • Unlimited Literess — your agentic AI literary editor: drafts, proofreads, sets things up for you
  • Teams — invite anyone free; add €29 seats to fund a shared word pool (100,000/mo each)
  • Top up anytime — extra words never expire

Start translating

Pro

For higher volume

€79/ month

300,000 words / month

For agencies & large catalogs

and Pro adds

  • 3× Starter’s allowance — headroom for batch work and full catalogs
  • Priority support — direct line, faster replies
  • Predictable bill — most months covered without top-ups

Begin at scale

Prices are in EUR. VAT is added at checkout where applicable — EU consumers see local VAT, while EU businesses with a valid VAT ID pay the net price under reverse charge. Top up any paid plan with word packs — 50,000 words for €19, 200,000 for €69, or 500,000 for €149 — and pack words never expire. Working as a team? Creating a team and inviting people is free; add seats (2 or more) to fund a shared word pool — each seat contributes its plan’s monthly words, on one invoice. Cancel anytime; 7-day money-back guarantee on your first subscription payment, no questions asked.

✦ Cost calculator ✦

Estimate the cost of your next project

Words to translate

50,000words

~167 pages

1,000100,000200,000

Monthly bill€29.00

  • Words used50,000 of 100,000 included on Starter

Covered by your €29 / mo Starter plan

The origin story✦

Nothing could translate what we wrote — so we built what could

Two writers, one problem.

— Vitalii.I wrote 120,000 words of satirical romance fantasy — mages drowning in debt, a multiverse economy that makes Wall Street look ethical, and a love story tangled up in all of it.

— Mariia.I write semi-fictional stories about real people, built around how it felt. Most of the people I wrote about were foreigners. We met in English, spoke in English, lived those moments in English. So I wrote them that way too.

“But I sometimes wonder what version of them I missed by not writing them in their language.”Mariia

— Vitalii.The same flatness hit me from the other side. Every tool I tried preserved the words but killed the voice. Tone, rhythm, wit, emotional texture — nothing held. It all came back flatter than it went in.

— Both of us.So we did what we know how to do. We read the machine-translation papers. We benchmarked Claude, GPT, Gemini, and a handful of open models on the same 50-page chapter — judging accuracy, tone, and whether the satire still landed. None of them held all three; each failed in a different way. So we built the tool we wished had existed when we started.

❧

Every decision, remembered

Start translating

Free to begin · No card required

    Literess reads, remembers, and acts

    A literary editor at your side — she remembers your projects and preferences between documents, reads the translation, and flags where the tone has flattened or the meaning has drifted. And she acts: run a workflow, draft a document, move a job across your board — on your say-so. Not a chatbot bolted on; an editor who does the work.

blocks.html_en: Prices are in EUR. VAT is added at checkout where applicable — EU consumers see local VAT, while EU businesses with a valid VAT ID pay the net price under reverse charge. Top up any paid plan with word packs — 50,000 words for €19, 200,000 for €69, or 500,000 for €149 — and pack words never expire. Working as a team? Creating a team and inviting people is free; add seats (2 or more) to fund a shared word pool — each seat contributes its plan’s monthly words, on one invoice. Cancel anytime; 7-day money-back guarantee on your first subscription payment, no questions asked.

sentences.en: VAT is added at checkout where applicable — EU consumers see local VAT, while EU businesses with a valid VAT ID pay the net price under reverse charge.
sentences.zh: 如果适用，结帐时会添加增值税 - 欧盟消费者会看到当地增值税，而拥有有效增值税 ID 的欧盟企业则根据反向收费支付净价。

sentences.en: The origin story✦
sentences.zh: 起源故事✦

blocks.html_en: Nothing could translate what we wrote — so we built what could

sentences.en: Nothing could translate what we wrote — so we built what could
sentences.zh: 没有什么可以翻译我们写的东西——所以我们构建了可以翻译的东西

sentences.en: Two writers, one problem.
sentences.zh: 两个作家，一个问题。

blocks.html_en: — Vitalii.I wrote 120,000 words of satirical romance fantasy — mages drowning in debt, a multiverse economy that makes Wall Street look ethical, and a love story tangled up in all of it.

sentences.en: — Vitalii.I wrote 120,000 words of satirical romance fantasy — mages drowning in debt, a multiverse economy that makes Wall Street look ethical, and a love story tangled up in all of it.
sentences.zh: — Vitalii.我写了 120,000 字的讽刺浪漫奇幻小说——负债累累的法师、让华尔街看起来道德的多元宇宙经济，以及纠缠在这一切之中的爱情故事。

blocks.html_en: — Mariia.I write semi-fictional stories about real people, built around how it felt. Most of the people I wrote about were foreigners. We met in English, spoke in English, lived those moments in English. So I wrote them that way too.

sentences.en: — Mariia.I write semi-fictional stories about real people, built around how it felt.
sentences.zh: — Mariia。我写关于真实人物的半虚构故事，围绕其感受展开。

sentences.en: Most of the people I wrote about were foreigners.
sentences.zh: 我写的大多数人都是外国人。

sentences.en: We met in English, spoke in English, lived those moments in English.
sentences.zh: 我们用英语见面，用英语交谈，用英语度过那些时刻。

sentences.en: So I wrote them that way too.
sentences.zh: 所以我也这样写。

blocks.html_en: “But I sometimes wonder what version of them I missed by not writing them in their language.”Mariia

sentences.en: “But I sometimes wonder what version of them I missed by not writing them in their language.”Mariia
sentences.zh: “但有时我想知道，由于没有用他们的语言来写，我错过了他们的哪个版本。”玛丽亚

blocks.html_en: — Vitalii.The same flatness hit me from the other side. Every tool I tried preserved the words but killed the voice. Tone, rhythm, wit, emotional texture — nothing held. It all came back flatter than it went in.

sentences.en: — Vitalii.The same flatness hit me from the other side.
sentences.zh: — Vitalii。同样的平坦度从另一侧击中了我。

sentences.en: Every tool I tried preserved the words but killed the voice.
sentences.zh: 我尝试过的每一种工具都保留了文字，却扼杀了声音。

sentences.en: Tone, rhythm, wit, emotional texture — nothing held.
sentences.zh: 语气、节奏、智慧、情感质感——没有任何保留。

sentences.en: It all came back flatter than it went in.
sentences.zh: 回来时一切都比进去时平坦。

blocks.html_en: — Both of us.So we did what we know how to do. We read the machine-translation papers. We benchmarked Claude, GPT, Gemini, and a handful of open models on the same 50-page chapter — judging accuracy, tone, and whether the satire still landed. None of them held all three; each failed in a different way. So we built the tool we wished had existed when we started.

sentences.en: — Both of us.So we did what we know how to do.
sentences.zh: ——我们俩。所以我们做了我们知道该怎么做的事情。

sentences.en: We read the machine-translation papers.
sentences.zh: 我们阅读机器翻译论文。

sentences.en: We benchmarked Claude, GPT, Gemini, and a handful of open models on the same 50-page chapter — judging accuracy, tone, and whether the satire still landed.
sentences.zh: 我们在同一个 50 页的章节中对 Claude、GPT、Gemini 和一些开放模型进行了基准测试——判断准确性、语气以及讽刺是否仍然有效。

sentences.en: None of them held all three; each failed in a different way.
sentences.zh: 他们中没有一个人同时拥有这三个。每个人都以不同的方式失败了。

sentences.en: So we built the tool we wished had existed when we started.
sentences.zh: 因此，我们构建了我们希望在开始时就存在的工具。

sentences.en: Every decision, remembered
sentences.zh: 每一个决定，都被铭记

sentences.en: Start translating
sentences.zh: 开始翻译

sentences.en: Free to begin · No card required
sentences.zh: 免费开始 · 无需刷卡

content_html_zh:
— 从文学小说到大规模本地化 —

每个决定都成为记忆

Transept AI 是人工智能驱动的翻译工作区，可以记住您的决定 - 每个术语和语气选择都适用于文档、语言和您的团队，并内置术语表、风格指南和评论。

没有项目

У замку повернувся ключ, і двері розчахнулися.

冷静点，爱——第二章你·上周

本文档55%

午夜前夕，敲门声传来。

Стукіт пролунав перед самою північчю.

冷静，爱你·今天

自动保存 · 正在搜索您翻译过的所有地方

交互式演示 — 单击任意内容

精选于

这是给谁的✦

三个受众，一个工作流程

  • I. 对于译员批量翻译、内置质量检查以及每个客户的风格指南 — 因此一份 50 页的工作读起来就像一位译员写的一样。翻译更快，交付更好 →
  • II.对于内容创作者来说，定义一次你的语气。 批量处理您的积压工作。 在发布窗口关闭之前以任何语言发布。用您的声音发布 →
  • III.对于本地化团队共享词汇表、共享样式指南、每个块上的评论线程 — 来自同一个事实来源的 12 种语言。扩展您的团队工作流程 →

产品✦

它实际上做了什么，分六个步骤

  • I. 引入任何文档，获取翻译 DOCX、PDF、MD、TXT — 或粘贴原始文本。 并排编辑器，您的语言对正在输入中。 翻译是起点，而不是终点。
  • II. 随身携带的词汇表构建一次，每个项目打开一次。 术语保持一致 - 第 1 页到第 500 页，语言 1 到语言 12。
  • III. 记忆会记住你的决定 你批准的每一个翻译都会被记住——措辞及其背后的推理：你拒绝的替代方案，解释该呼吁的评论。 Transept 在下一次运行时将其交还给模型，跨越您的文档和整个团队。 我们称之为决策上下文记忆——不是你从中复制的查找，而是承载你的判断的记忆，而不仅仅是你的话语。
  • IV.使用 Direction 句子级控件来引导任何句子。 添加自定义方向（“更正式”、“保留隐喻”），您的术语表和样式指南会自动输入 - 因此重写会遵循您的术语并保持您的语气。 页面的其余部分保持不变。
  • V.Literess 阅读、记忆和扮演您身边的文学编辑 — 她会记住您的项目和文档之间的偏好，阅读翻译，并标记语气平淡或含义偏离的地方。 她会采取行动：运行工作流程、起草文档、在董事会中转移工作——按照您的吩咐。 不是一个固定的聊天机器人；从事这项工作的编辑。
  • VI. 审阅并发布最终通稿的清晰阅读视图。 对任何区块的评论；回复并解决到位。 向审阅者或客户发送链接 — 无需通过电子邮件发送 DOCX。

Pricing✦

简单的定价

为您实际翻译的字数付费——自助服务，无需推销。 当您需要更多时补充；额外的单词不会过期。

标准模式每个源字占用 1 个字。 专业模式使用更深层次的模型——每个源单词 3 个单词。 手动编辑、导出、评论和审阅活动都是免费的——只有在人工智能翻译块时才需要花费文字。

从规模开始

价格以欧元为单位。 如果适用，结帐时会添加增值税 - 欧盟消费者会看到当地增值税，而拥有有效增值税 ID 的欧盟企业则根据反向收费支付净价。 使用单词包为任何付费计划充值——50,000 个单词只需 19 欧元，200,000 个单词只需 69 欧元，500,000 个单词只需 149 欧元——并且单词包永不过期。 团队合作？ 创建团队和邀请人员都是免费的；添加席位（2 个或更多）来资助共享单词池 - 每个席位在一张发票上贡献其计划的每月单词。 随时取消；首笔订阅付款可享受 7 天退款保证，无任何问题。

起源故事✦

没有什么可以翻译我们写的东西——所以我们构建了可以翻译的东西

两个作家，一个问题。

— Vitalii.我写了 120,000 字的讽刺浪漫奇幻小说——负债累累的法师、让华尔街看起来道德的多元宇宙经济，以及纠缠在这一切之中的爱情故事。

— Mariia。我写关于真实人物的半虚构故事，围绕其感受展开。 我写的大多数人都是外国人。 我们用英语见面，用英语交谈，用英语度过那些时刻。 所以我也这样写。

“但有时我想知道，由于没有用他们的语言来写，我错过了他们的哪个版本。”玛丽亚

— Vitalii。同样的平坦度从另一侧击中了我。 我尝试过的每一种工具都保留了文字，却扼杀了声音。 语气、节奏、智慧、情感质感——没有任何保留。 回来时一切都比进去时平坦。

——我们俩。所以我们做了我们知道该怎么做的事情。 我们阅读机器翻译论文。 我们在同一个 50 页的章节中对 Claude、GPT、Gemini 和一些开放模型进行了基准测试——判断准确性、语气以及讽刺是否仍然有效。 他们中没有一个人同时拥有这三个。每个人都以不同的方式失败了。 因此，我们构建了我们希望在开始时就存在的工具。
